title: Allay Totem of Undying
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a custom retextured Allay model!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e636e862659ed37deec49602ee793de178ba1175.png)
### <center> 1.21.5+ </center>
<center> This pack replaces the default Totem of Undying with a custom 3D model, based on the Allay and textured after the original Totem for a sense of familiarity and cohesiveness that fits perfectly into the game. </center>
